location_evidence_text: We sampled 18 cattle subfossils from different ages and different mountain caves in Galicia, of which 11 were subject to sequencing of the mitochondrial genome and phylogenetic analysis.
chronology_text: Neolithic to later Galician cattle sequence
review_note: Current evidence stays at region or transect scale and must not masquerade as exact sample-site truth.
